buttonTemplates.label: ✅ Done / 🔄 Active
buttonTemplates.tooltip: Toggle this note's status between active and done

actions.code:
const file = app.workspace.getActiveFile();
await app.fileManager.processFrontMatter(file, fm => { fm.status = (fm.status === "active") ? "done" : "active"; });

buttonTemplates.label: 📌 Pin / Unpin
buttonTemplates.tooltip: Pin/unpin this note to the Dashboard (stays even when done)

actions.code:
const file = app.workspace.getActiveFile();
await app.fileManager.processFrontMatter(file, fm => { fm.pinned = !(fm.pinned === true); });
